summary: Completed comprehensive testing of modal options functionality including gender selection, trap filtering, TrapDisplay component, and badge display. All core features are working correctly with minor UI interaction issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay occasionally intercepts button clicks preventing modal from reopening
Still shows opacity-50 styling when enabled (C1 level selected)

design_issues.issue: Symptoms and competencies sections may not be clearly visible in automated testing

passed_tests: Options button successfully opens modal dialog
Modal contains all required selectors: Genre (Aléatoire/Homme/Femme), Niveau (C1-C4/Aléatoire), Avancement, Piège
Advancement selector is properly disabled when level is Aléatoire
Gender selection works correctly - Femme option can be selected
Level selection works correctly - C1 and C3 levels can be selected
Trap filtering works correctly for C1 level - shows Coordination, Commandes, Volant, Observation
Trap filtering works correctly for C3 level - shows Observation, Vitesse, Stress (excludes C1-specific Commandes)
Profile generation with Femme gender creates female student profiles
Profile generation with trap selection displays TrapDisplay component in left column
TrapDisplay shows trap information including label, description, and trap details
Coordination trap can be selected and generates appropriate trap display
Options badges display system is present ('Options actives' text found)
Modal configuration state persists correctly (C3 level shows in Résumé des options)
Toast notifications work for profile generation
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal overlay interaction issue that occasionally prevents reopening modal. Consider improving visibility of TrapDisplay sections for better UX. Remove opacity-50 styling from advancement selector when it should be enabled.
